outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US-Iran ceasefire tested as Iran alleges infractions
outlets.summary: Fragile ceasefire under strain as Iran accuses US of 3 violations. Lebanon strikes killed 254.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire shows cracks as Israel pounds Lebanon
outlets.summary: Ceasefire threatened by Lebanon exclusion dispute and Hormuz re-closure.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth declares 'decisive military victory' over Iran
outlets.summary: Pentagon declares Operation Epic Fury a historic victory using <10% of US combat power.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Pete Hegseth declares 'historic and overwhelming victory' in Iran
outlets.summary: Hegseth credits Trump for forging ceasefire after military dominance.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump threatens action if Tehran fails to comply
outlets.summary: Rolling liveblog covering ceasefire fractures, Lebanon strikes, Hormuz standoff.

outlets.name: BBC/Reuters
outlets.headline: World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, urges lasting peace
outlets.summary: Global leaders cautiously welcome ceasefire but question its durability.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF launches largest airstrikes yet on Hezbollah after truce with Iran
outlets.summary: 50 fighter jets strike 100+ Hezbollah targets in 10 minutes across Lebanon.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu: Iran ceasefire 'not end of war,' all goals will be achieved
outlets.summary: Netanyahu asserts ceasefire excludes Lebanon and vows continued action.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Speaker Qalibaf says ceasefire 'unreasonable' citing violations
outlets.summary: Iran Parliament Speaker accuses US of 3 ceasefire violations, calls negotiations unreasonable.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Israel violates ceasefire with brutal attacks on Lebanon
outlets.summary: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz in response to Israeli strikes on Lebanon.
